data.title: Integrate skogix/actions/ skill examples (28 skills)
data.description:
**Context:** skogix/actions/ contains 28 documented skill testing examples and frameworks that could benefit the broader skogai ecosystem.

**Current skills:**

* ansible-core, arch-wiki, argc, brainstorming, cloudflare
* condition-based-waiting, defense-in-depth, developing-claude-code-plugins
* dispatching-parallel-agents, executing-plans, finishing-a-development-branch
* learning-argc, receiving-code-review, requesting-code-review
* root-cause-tracing, sharing-skills, subagent-driven-development
* systematic-debugging, test-driven-development, testing-anti-patterns
* testing-skills-with-subagents, using-git-worktrees, using-skogactions
* using-superpowers, verification-before-completion, working-with-claude-code
* writing-plans, writing-skills

**Decision needed:**

* Where should skill examples live in the broader skogai structure?
* Should they be merged with existing @tools/ or kept separate?
* Are these personal examples or reusable across the team?

**Related:** Part of skogix folder integration (#skogix-integration)
